sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application Nos.102, 106 & 107 of 2010 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For order on CMA No.782/2010 2. For hearing of main case 24.03.2026 Mr. Samiur Rehman Advocate undertakes to file vakalatnama on behalf of the respondent in ITRA Nos.106 and 107 of 2010. These references are pending since 2010 without any significant progress. Even today, sixteen years later, applicant remains unrepresented without any intimation and or justification. It appears that the applicant department is no longer interested in proceeding with these references, therefore, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, these references are dismissed for non- prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. JUDGE JUDGE Asif
